chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-2861 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of Misc.No.12958/2024 2.For hearing of main case. 03.02.2025 Mr.Fahad Khan, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Imran Ahmed Khan Abro, A.A.G. Mr.Fahad Hussain, Advocate for the Respondent (S.R.B) This Petition was filed by impugning the recovery proceedings initiated by the respondent Department, during the pendency of the appeal before the learned Appellate Tribunal, Sindh Revenue Board, Karachi (Respondent No.5). The respective learned counsel jointly state that it may be just and proper to dispose of this petition with directions for expeditious conclusion of the appeal, while restraining the recovery of the impugned demand in the interim period. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of by directing the learned Appellate Tribunal, Sindh Revenue Board, Karachi (Respondent No.5) to decide the pending Appeal expeditiously; preferably within 60 days from the date hereof. However, the respondents shall not take any coercive action against the petitioner, in respect of the impugned demand, till the conclusion of the Appeal. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. Judge Judge nasir
